channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Americans are destroying Flock surveillance cameras
item.description: While some cities are moving to end their contracts with Flock over its links to ICE, others are taking matters into their own hands.

item.title: How AI agents could destroy the economy
item.description: Citrini Research imagines a report from two years in the future, in which unemployment has doubled and the total value of the stock market has fallen ...

item.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese AI labs of mining Claude as US debates AI chip exports
item.description: Anthropic accuses DeepSeek, Moonshot, and MiniMax of using 24,000 fake accounts to distill Claude’s AI capabilities, as U.S. officials debate export c...

item.title: The Best iPad to Buy (and Some to Avoid) in 2026
item.description: We break down the current iPad lineup to help you figure out which of Apple’s tablets is best for you.

item.title: Best Puffer Jacket (2026): Patagonia, Arc’teryx, REI
item.description: Our favorite down puffer jackets will keep you warm in the backcountry and around town.

item.title: Google’s Cloud AI lead on the three frontiers of model capability
item.description: AI models are pushing against three frontiers at once: raw intelligence, response time, and a third quality you might call "extensibility."

item.title: Uber’s new autonomous vehicle division is about survival and opportunity
item.description: Uber Autonomous Solutions will see the company taking on all the tasks associated with operating a robotaxi, self-driving truck, or sidewalk delivery ...

item.title: Ex-Apple team launches Acme Weather, a new take on weather forecasting
item.description: The team that sold their last app Dark Sky to Apple are back with Acme Weather, which offers alternative forecasts, rainbow and sunset alerts, and mor...

item.title: 5 days left to lock in the lowest TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket rates
item.description: 5 days to save up to $680 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket. These lowest rates of the year disappear on February 27 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register h...

item.title: Defense Secretary summons Anthropic’s Amodei over military use of Claude
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has summoned Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei to the Pentagon for a tense discussion over the military's use of Claude. Hegse...
